channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: Zimbabwean man accused of killing wife, daughters arrested in SA @3menonaboat
item.description:
The suspect was caught in an Interpol and SA police operation

The post Zimbabwean man accused of killing wife, daughters arrested in SA first appeared on Three Men On a Boat.

(via Three Men On Boat) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Three Men On Boat

item.title: 2 Women Arrested Over WhatsApp Job Scam That Duped More Than 100 People
item.description: Over 100 Job Seekers Allegedly Duped After Joining ‘Job Opportunities’ WhatsApp Group Two women have been arrested after an alleged WhatsApp job scam reportedly duped more than 100 people who were searching for work. Police say the victims were lured into a group called “Job opportunities” and asked to pay money after being promised employment. [...] The post 2 Women Arrested Over WhatsApp Job Scam That Duped More Than 100 People appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Suspected UK family killer arrested in South Africa
item.description: SOUTH AFRICA – A United Kingdom man of Zimbabwean heritage wanted in connection with the murder of his wife and two children has been arrested in South Africa. Mkhanyisi Tshuma was apprehended in Kensington, Johannesburg, during a joint operation involving the South African Police Service Organised Crime Unit and Interpol. Tshuma is the prime suspect [...] The post Suspected UK family killer arrested in South Africa appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: MBINGA YANYURA: Zimbabwean Man Who Killed Wife and Two Daughters in UK Then Fled to Africa Finally Caught and Arrested
item.description: Johannesburg – A chilling international manhunt concluded dramatically this week with the arrest of Zimbabwean millionaire Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, 45, in Gauteng, South Africa. Tshuma, also known as Mark, was wanted by British authorities in connection with the brutal murders of his wife, Nothabo Zandile Tshuma, 42, and their two young daughters, Natalie, 15, and [...] The post MBINGA YANYURA: Zimbabwean Man Who Killed Wife and Two Daughters in UK Then Fled to Africa Finally Caught and Arrested first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Old Mutual to migrate from ZSE to VFEX after 6-year suspension @bulawayo24 @ZSE_ZW
item.description: Old Mutual Limited (OML) will migrate its Zimbabwe listing from the Zimbabwe Stock Exchange (ZSE) to the Victoria Falls Stock Exchange (VFEX), bringing an end to a trading suspension that has been in... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Zimbabwean IT consultant arrested in South Africa over alleged murder of wife and daughters in UK @nehandaradio
item.description: A Zimbabwean-born IT consultant wanted over the deaths of his wife and two daughters in the UK has been arrested in South Africa after an international search involving Interpol. The post Zimbabwean IT consultant arrested in South Africa over alleged murder of wife and daughters in UK appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma Arrested In SA After Allegedly Killing Wife And Daughters In UK
item.description: Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma Arrested In SA After Fleeing UK Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma, the 45-year-old man wanted in connection with the deaths of his wife and two daughters in the United Kingdom, has reportedly been arrested in South Africa. The dramatic development comes days after British police launched an international search for him following the discovery [...] The post Ndodana Mkhanyisi Tshuma Arrested In SA After Allegedly Killing Wife And Daughters In UK appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Epworth man stabbed multiple times for refusing to attend National Hero Major General Dzihwema’s Burial
item.description: The High Cost of Saying NO!: Epworth Man Left for Dead After Spurning National Hero’s Burial HARARE – In the flickering shadows of the Manjemanje shops in Hopley Zone 6, the distinction between patriotic duty and personal survival was blurred with the jagged edge of a broken beer bottle. On the evening of 5 July [...] The post Epworth man stabbed multiple times for refusing to attend National Hero Major General Dzihwema’s Burial first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Mnangagwa gifts vehicles to journalists Zenzele Ndebele and Robert Tapfumaneyi @nehandaradio
item.description: President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s government has handed brand-new off-road vehicles to journalists Zenzele Ndebele and Robert Tapfumaneyi, two media practitioners with long histories of facing harassment while reporting in Zimbabwe. The post Mnangagwa gifts vehicles to journalists Zenzele Ndebele and Robert Tapfumaneyi appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Retired military chiefs urge Zimbabweans to revolt against constitutional amendments @nehandaradio
item.description: Retired military officers and former senior civil servants have urged Zimbabweans to organise and peacefully oppose Constitutional Amendment Act No. 6, describing it as an assault on the 2013 Constitution. The post Retired military chiefs urge Zimbabweans to revolt against constitutional amendments appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: The Borrowdale Tesla Accident: What Really Happened When Tinashe Mutarisi Jr’s Luxury Car Clashed Head-On?
item.description: The affluent suburb of Borrowdale, typically a sanctuary of manicured lawns and high-walled estates, was recently the scene of a high-profile collision that has reignited a fierce national debate regarding road safety, privilege, and accountability. In the early evening hours of Wednesday, 8 July 2026, a white Tesla Model Y—a symbol of modern luxury and [...] The post The Borrowdale Tesla Accident: What Really Happened When Tinashe Mutarisi Jr’s Luxury Car Clashed Head-On? first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Kylian Mbappé has a goal and an assist as France beats Morocco 2-0 in the World Cup quarterfinals
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass.— Kylian Mbappé spread his arms out wide and spun around after scoring his eighth goal of this year’s World Cup. He later gave the jubilant France fans dotted around the stadium a wave when he left the game because of an injury scare. Les Bleus, with a star striker who said he’s fine [...] The post Kylian Mbappé has a goal and an assist as France beats Morocco 2-0 in the World Cup quarterfinals appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Junior MP’s plea for Wicknell Chivayo to buy cars and iPhones sparks outrage in Zimbabwe @nehandaradio @wicknellchivayo
item.description: A Junior Parliament member’s appeal for Wicknell Chivayo to buy cars and iPhones for young legislators has sparked widespread criticism over Zimbabwe’s culture of entitlement. The post Junior MP’s plea for Wicknell Chivayo to buy cars and iPhones sparks outrage in Zimbabwe appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: How moving from single-use to reusable packaging protects firms from geopolitical turmoil
item.description: Disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz have tightened global petrochemical feedstock supply and driven plastic prices to record highs, jumping nearly 40% since February. Several prominent Asian petrochemical producers have already invoked force majeure and halted plastic production. Since 40% of all plastic is used for single-use packaging, these market shocks cause dramatic price hikes [...] The post How moving from single-use to reusable packaging protects firms from geopolitical turmoil appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail
